channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Economy Shows Growth in Exports, Manufacturing, Gold, and Tourism in March 2026
item.description: During March 2026, Tanzania’s economy showed strong signs of growth in several key sectors. Exports increased by 12.8%, mainly driven by a significant 38.5% rise in gold exports. Manufacturing sector ...

item.title: Meta introduces private AI chats on WhatsApp to enhance user privacy
item.description: Meta Platforms is set to roll out a new 'incognito chat' feature for its AI assistant on WhatsApp, aimed at protecting user privacy. The company says this feature will use private processing technolog...

item.title: Recommended Waxing Salons in Metro Manila for Smooth Skin Results
item.description: This beauty feature highlights several top waxing salons across Metro Manila that offer professional hair removal services for both men and women. With the growing demand for smooth, hair-free skin, t...

item.title: Ivan Cleary to step down from NRL club role
item.description: Ivan Cleary, the head coach of a prominent NRL club, has announced he will be leaving his position. This decision has taken the league and fans by surprise, given Cleary's notable track record and inf...

item.title: Union Cabinet Increases MSP for 14 Kharif Crops for 2026-27 to Support Farmers
item.description: The Union Cabinet on Wednesday approved an increase in Minimum Support Prices (MSP) for 14 Kharif crops for the 2026-27 marketing season, aiming to provide a total payout of ₹2.60 lakh crore to farmer...

item.title: Australian Government Withdraws Funding for Invictus Australia Amid Trustee Resignation
item.description: Prince Harry’s veterans charity, Invictus Australia, is facing a significant challenge following the Australian government's decision to cease its £4.83 million funding, originally pledged over three ...

item.title: Rising Water Costs in the U.S. Linked to Climate Change and Droughts
item.description: Across the United States, water systems are facing unprecedented stress due to climate change, which is contributing to prolonged droughts and more intense storms. Cities like Corpus Christi, Texas, h...

item.title: Murder investigation launched after man dies following car incident involving multiple pedestrians in Arnold
item.description: A murder investigation has been opened by Nottinghamshire Police after a 26-year-old man named Tyler Fairman died in hospital following an incident in Arnold. On Saturday 9 May shortly before 1:10 BST...

item.title: Scientists Detect Early Signs of Tectonic Activity in Zambia's Kafue Rift
item.description: Researchers have identified early indicators of tectonic rifting beneath the Kafue Rift in Zambia, suggesting the potential formation of a new tectonic boundary in central Africa. By analyzing helium ...

item.title: A Look Back at the Bond Between People and Dogs Through Vintage Photography
item.description: Dogs and humans have shared a deep and evolving relationship for thousands of years, originally centered on survival and practical needs. In earlier times, dogs were primarily valued as working partne...

item.title: Trump Visits Beijing for Strategic Talks with President Xi Amid Trade and Middle East Concerns
item.description: United States President Donald Trump reached Beijing on Wednesday to hold crucial meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Ahead of the summit, Trump emphasised on urging Xi to open China’s markets...

item.title: Rivers State Government Provides Science Materials To All Senior Secondary Schools
item.description: Rivers State Government don show serious commitment to improving education as dem distribute science equipment and materials to all senior secondary schools across the state. Dis distribution dey aim ...

item.title: Cristo Fernández joins El Paso Locomotive after returning to football
item.description: Cristo Fernández, the Mexican actor we sabi well from Ted Lasso as Dani Rojas, don return to professional football at age 35. After giving up football due to knee injury when he was 15 for Guadalajara...

item.title: Alexx’s Journey and Efforts to Raise Cancer Awareness
item.description: Alexx don dey make plenty effort to raise awareness about cancer over time. Dis photo gallery show how Alexx don dey educate people on cancer prevention, early detection, and support for those wey dey...

item.title: DILG Secretary Jonvic Remulla assures safety of Senator Bato dela Rosa during Senate lockdown and shooting incident
item.description: Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla assured the public that Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa is safe and secure inside the Senate building amid the ongoing tension and lockdown on Wednesday evening. Remu...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Limits Repeat Asylum Applications, Sparking Concerns
item.description: Human rights organisations and leaders of immigrant communities in South Africa have expressed disappointment over the Constitutional Court's recent decision which found that rejected asylum seekers c...

item.title: Simba aim for victory over Mashujaa FC to stay close to Yanga in league race
item.description: Simba SC are heading into an important Mainland Premier League match against Mashujaa FC at Lake Tanganyika Stadium tomorrow, May 14, 2026, hoping to keep their title hopes alive. Currently second in ...

item.title: Edo Security Arrest 12 Suspected Cultists, Seal Apartments Used For Initiation
item.description: For Edo State, the Special Security Squad don carry out major operation wey dem call 'Operation Flush Out Cultists and Kidnappers' after one young man die for the University of Benin gate on Sunday, M...

item.title: Governor AbdulRazaq Cleared for Kwara Central Senate Race Amid APC Succession Planning
item.description: Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq of Kwara State don finish screening for APC primary to contest Kwara Central Senatorial seat for 2027 elections. The screening happen for Abuja on Monday, and e confirm...

item.title: Eleonora Rossi Drago: Icon of Elegance in Post-War Italian Cinema
item.description: Eleonora Rossi Drago (1925–2007) was one of the most distinguished figures of Italian cinema during the golden era following World War II. Initially starting her career as a fashion model and a contes...
